subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out from Partner Corp. I'd be happy to arrange an introductory call to explore potential synergies.

I have the following slots available next week, all 14:00–16:00:
• Monday, April 21, 2026
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026  
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026

Please let me know which date works best for you.

Regarding your request for internal contact details, I'm unable to share private contact information. Please refer to our public website for general contact channels and publicly listed information.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards
